# CPA Field Guide
> Independent, vendor-neutral directory of US tax & accounting software for CPA and accounting firms — tax preparation, deadline monitoring, practice management, and bookkeeping. Every tool is defined, priced, and rated for how open it is to integration. No vendor pays for placement. Reviewed 2026-07-08.

## Categories
- [Tax Preparation](https://cpafieldguide.com/tax-preparation-software): Professional tax preparation software for US CPA firms: Drake, Lacerte, ProConnect, ProSeries, UltraTax CS, CCH Axcess, and ATX — what each does, who it fits, and how open it is to integration.
- [Deadline & Compliance Tracking](https://cpafieldguide.com/deadline-monitoring-software): Deadline tracking and compliance monitoring tools for CPA firms: File In Time, DueDateHQ, and ONESOURCE Calendar — passive trackers versus active monitors that watch the IRS, states, and FEMA.
- [Practice Management](https://cpafieldguide.com/practice-management-software): Practice management and workflow software for accounting firms: Karbon, TaxDome, Canopy, Financial Cents, Jetpack Workflow, Keeper, Firm360, Pixie, Aiwyn, and Ignition — features, firm-size fit, and API openness.
- [Accounting & Bookkeeping](https://cpafieldguide.com/accounting-software): General-ledger and bookkeeping software CPA firms use: QuickBooks Online, Xero, Bill.com, Sage, and the Intuit ProAdvisor channel — and how each connects to the rest of the firm stack.

## Guides
- [CPA & accounting software with an open API](https://cpafieldguide.com/cpa-software-with-open-api)
- [Best software for solo CPA firms](https://cpafieldguide.com/best-cpa-software-for-solo-firms)
- [Best software for small CPA firms](https://cpafieldguide.com/best-cpa-software-for-small-firms)

## Tools
- [Drake Tax](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/drake-tax): Tax Preparation. From $2,145/yr. File export. Dominant among sole practitioners. No API; file export.
- [Lacerte](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/lacerte): Tax Preparation. Custom · per-return. Local SDK. High-end desktop engine. Local SDK/ODBC can read on-prem.
- [ProConnect](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proconnect): Tax Preparation. Pay-per-return. No API yet. Intuit's cloud prep. No public API yet — "under review."
- [ProSeries](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proseries): Tax Preparation. From $419/yr. File export. Desktop for 1040 volume. No API or SDK; file import.
- [UltraTax CS](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/ultratax-cs): Tax Preparation. Custom quote. File export. Thomson Reuters engine for larger firms. Exports a client list to CSV.
- [CCH Axcess](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/cch-axcess): Tax Preparation. From $2,299/yr. API · partner. The one exception: a real cloud API and marketplace, via a partner program.
- [ATX](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/atx): Tax Preparation. From $939/yr. File export. Budget forms-based desktop. CSV export only.
- [File In Time](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/file-in-time): Deadline & Compliance Tracking. Paid license. Closed. Long-standing passive tracker: records due dates and rolls them forward; doesn't watch the regulatory sources.
- [DueDateHQ](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/duedatehq): Deadline & Compliance Tracking. Free · beta. No public API yet. Active monitor of the IRS, states, and FEMA — when a date moves, shows which clients it hits. Free in beta.
- [ONESOURCE Calendar](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/onesource-calendar): Deadline & Compliance Tracking. Custom quote. Suite · gated. Thomson Reuters' enterprise compliance calendar for multi-year deadlines, filings, and extensions.
- [Karbon](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/karbon): Practice Management. From $59/user/mo. Open API. Workflow, email and billing. The best public API in the category.
- [TaxDome](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/taxdome): Practice Management. From $67/user/mo. Open API. All-in-one with client portal. Self-serve API keys; large install base.
- [Canopy](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/canopy): Practice Management. From $45/user/mo. Gated. CRM, workflow, documents, billing. API is approval-gated.
- [Financial Cents](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/financial-cents): Practice Management. From $19/user/mo. Gated. Recurring workflows and tasks. Open API on the higher plan.
- [Jetpack Workflow](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/jetpack-workflow): Practice Management. From $36/user/mo. Gated. Lightweight deadline &amp; job tracker. Direct API is Enterprise-only.
- [Keeper](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/keeper): Practice Management. From $200/mo. Zapier. Bookkeeping close with QuickBooks sync. Zapier only.
- [Firm360](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/firm360): Practice Management. From $49/user/mo. Zapier. Projects, documents, billing, portal. Zapier connector only.
- [Pixie](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/pixie): Practice Management. From $129/mo. Zapier. Simple management, UK-leaning. Integrates via Zapier.
- [Aiwyn](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/aiwyn): Practice Management. Custom · enterprise. Partner. Billing / revenue-cycle for larger firms. Managed partnerships.
- [Ignition](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/ignition): Practice Management. From $39/mo. Zapier. Proposals, engagement letters, billing. Zapier only.
- [QuickBooks Online](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/quickbooks-online): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From $35/mo. Open API. Dominant US ledger, 500k ProAdvisors. Self-serve API.
- [Xero](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/xero): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From $25/mo. Open API. #2 cloud ledger. Self-serve API, up to 25 orgs before certification.
- [Bill.com](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/bill-com): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From $45/user/mo. Open API. AP/AR and payments. The friendliest self-serve API here.
- [Sage](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/sage): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From ~$10/mo. Gated. SMB Accounting through mid-market Intacct. APIs are fragmented.
- [ProAdvisor](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proadvisor): Accounting & Bookkeeping. Free · program. Partner program. Not a tool — the accountant program around QuickBooks. 500k members.
